com.github.robtimus.obfuscation.jackson.databind.ObfuscationModule

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ObfuscationModule
    ObfuscationModule.Builder.build()
    Creates a new ObfuscationModule with the current settings of this builder.
    static ObfuscationModule
    ObfuscationModule.defaultModule()
    Returns a module with all settings set to default.
